name: Moon Build System (moonrepo)
what_it_does: Rust-powered polyglot monorepo build system with task orchestration, intelligent caching, and remote cache via Moonbase — supporting JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust, Go, Ruby, and more with language-aware toolchain management and CI optimization.
use_cases: Running tasks across polyglot monorepo with affected change detection and dependency ordering
Sharing build cache across CI runners via Moonbase remote cache API
Managing language toolchains (Node.js versions, Rust channels) per project in monorepo
Generating project graph and task dependency reports for CI optimization
Enforcing task boundaries and ownership in large engineering organizations
not_for: Single-language repos without monorepo complexity (use npm/cargo directly)
Teams deeply invested in Nx or Turborepo ecosystem without migration appetite
Projects requiring complex build graph logic beyond task orchestration
best_when: A polyglot team needs a fast, Rust-powered monorepo tool with language-aware toolchain management and remote caching without JavaScript build tool limitations.
avoid_when: You're JavaScript-only and the Nx/Turborepo ecosystem meets your needs, or you need mature enterprise support.

auth.notes: Moonbase API key for remote cache. Organization-scoped tokens. CLI uses token from environment variable. No fine-grained scopes — token grants full workspace cache access. Open-source Moon has no auth (local only).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Moon CLI: MIT licensed — completely free; Moonbase: free for open-source projects
pricing.paid_tiers: Moonbase Pro from $20/month; Team plans available
pricing.notes: MIT licensed open-source CLI — free forever. Moonbase (remote cache + CI insights) is SaaS with free tier for OSS. Smaller ecosystem than Nx but growing rapidly. Rust-based — significantly faster than JS-based tools. proto tool for polyglot toolchain management.

performance.rate_limits: Moonbase API rate limits per plan

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: CLI-first tool — Moonbase API is secondary. Project graph accessible as JSON output. Task run results and timing available via CLI output. Moonbase REST API for cache and run data. Smaller documentation ecosystem than Nx.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Task execution fully idempotent with caching (same inputs = cache hit). Cache reads idempotent. Run records create new entries per run.
known_agent_gotchas: CLI-first — Moonbase API is supplementary; most operations via moon CLI
Moonbase remote cache requires signup — local execution works without account
Polyglot toolchain management via proto (separate tool) — additional setup
Smaller community than Nx/Turborepo — fewer plugins and integrations

security_score_components.security_notes: MIT open source Rust codebase — auditable and memory-safe. TLS enforced on Moonbase. API keys for cache access. Build artifacts encrypted in transit. No formal certifications. Rust's memory safety reduces supply chain risk.
